barbarian.name: Barbarian
barbarian.description: A force of raw power focused on high-damage melee and disruptive presence.

engine_passive.name: Savage Might
engine_passive.description: Your Martial Potency increases by 1% for every 5% of HP you are missing.

monk.name: Monk
monk.description: Uses stances to alter their combat style between aggression and defense.

engine_passive.name: Flowing Form
engine_passive.description: Switching Manifestations (Stances) grants a temporary 10% Evasion boost.

beastmaster.name: Beastmaster
beastmaster.description: A commander of the wild who uses beasts to harass and defend.

engine_passive.name: Pack Leader
engine_passive.description: Manifestations originating from [utility] tagged beast-summons have 20% increased Potency.

juggernaut.name: Juggernaut
juggernaut.description: An unstoppable force of momentum and heavy protection.

engine_passive.name: Momentum
engine_passive.description: Reduces the duration of movement-impairing Manifestations by 50%.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: A precision striker who controls range and tracks prey.

engine_passive.name: Wilderness Guide
engine_passive.description: Your [utility] tagged blessings ignore terrain-based movement penalties.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.description: An offensive powerhouse that thrives in the chaos of melee combat.

engine_passive.name: Eternal Rage
engine_passive.description: While in combat, you are immune to [disruption] tags that cause fear or charm.

druid.name: Druid
druid.description: A guardian of nature who commands earth, storms, and growth.

engine_passive.name: Natural Attunement
engine_passive.description: Regenerate 1% HP per tick while in a [wilderness] terrain zone.

gunner.name: Gunner
gunner.description: A pure ranged damage dealer specializing in mechanical force.

engine_passive.name: Ballistics
engine_passive.description: Increases critical hit damage by 5% per Lethal Potency level.

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.description: A hybrid combatant excelling in tracking and taming.

engine_passive.name: Marked Prey
engine_passive.description: Your first [strike] against a new target deals 20% bonus damage.

samurai.name: Samurai
samurai.description: Precision-based melee warrior with spirit-infused techniques.

engine_passive.name: Spirit Blade
engine_passive.description: Your Martial damage ignores 10% of the target's Magic protection resonance.

geomancer.name: Geomancer
geomancer.description: Manipulates the battlefield by using terrain features as sources of power.

engine_passive.name: Leyline Tap
engine_passive.description: Elemental resonance is increased by 20% while standing on matching terrain.

scout.name: Scout
scout.description: Mobile melee fighter specializing in hit-and-run tactics.

engine_passive.name: Pathfinder
engine_passive.description: While [concealed], your next Utility blessing does not trigger a tick.

sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
sorcerer.description: A conduit of raw magic who fuels spells with instinctual force.

engine_passive.name: Innate Surge
engine_passive.description: When your HP is below 25%, all Magic Potency is doubled for 3 turns.

viking.name: Viking
viking.description: A raider from the sea who excels with axes and shields.

engine_passive.name: Sea Born
engine_passive.description: Martial resonance increases by 10% while in Water or Rain conditions.

warden.name: Warden
warden.description: A guardian of the wilds who protects nature with heavy armor.

engine_passive.name: Rooted
engine_passive.description: You cannot be moved or knocked back while your Protection resonance is active.

shaman.name: Shaman
shaman.description: Casts spells that evolve over time and summons ancestral spirits.

engine_passive.name: Spirit Link
engine_passive.description: Every 5 ticks, your highest resonance is increased by 15% for one heartbeat.
